name: ttp-clone
description: Outside Feet Phase 1 PWA (root Vite app) + dev dependencies for testing Supabase edge function logic locally. Edge functions run on Deno; supabase/functions/*/deno.json maps the same package names for deploy.

scripts.test: tsx supabase/functions/traccar-receiver/ping.test.ts && tsx supabase/functions/ics-ingest/parse.test.ts && tsx src/mediaPath.test.ts && tsx src/format.test.ts && tsx src/formUtils.test.ts && tsx src/weather.test.ts && tsx src/dogLabel.test.ts && tsx supabase/functions/_shared/routePng.test.ts && tsx supabase/functions/_shared/reportEmail.test.ts && tsx supabase/functions/_shared/recurrence.test.ts
